Variants._doc: ADR-0059 §15.5. Flag flipped ON 2026-04-29 — user (Shaker) accepted PRR-249 legal posture directly; counsel memo not blocking. Source-anchored variant flow is live: GenerateVariantsJobStrategy seeds the LLM with Bagrut prompt+latex (with do-not-copy guardrails per §15.5) and persists each passing candidate via IQuestionBankService.CreateQuestionAsync. See docs/engineering/feature-flags.md.

Gemini.Comment: ApiKey is sourced from environment via docker-compose (Ocr__Gemini__ApiKey, set in repo-root .env). Do NOT paste keys into this tracked file.
